site.description: Motorcycle workshop and shop for accessories, spare parts and gear. Professional service with a personal touch.

hero.title: Your bike in the best hands
hero.subtitle: Professional mechanics, quality parts and selected accessories. Visit our shop or contact us on WhatsApp.

services.title: Workshop services
services.subtitle: Maintenance, repairs and preparation so you can enjoy your bike with total confidence.

mechanics.title: General mechanics
mechanics.description: Inspections, tune-ups and engine, transmission and brake repairs.

tyres.title: Tyres and suspension
tyres.description: Fitting, balancing and suspension setup for maximum comfort and safety.

electric.title: Electrical systems
electric.description: Diagnosis and repair of electrical systems, batteries and lighting.

itv.title: Pre-MOT preparation
itv.description: Pre-inspection and preparation so your bike passes the MOT without surprises.

cta.title: Need help with your bike?
cta.subtitle: Message us on WhatsApp or visit the shop. We're happy to advise you.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Accessories, parts and gear organised by category.

catalog.title: Showcase

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: At {{name}} we respect your privacy and process your personal data transparently and securely, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Spanish data protection law.

data.title: 2. Data we collect
data.body:
Depending on how you use the website, we may process:
• Account data: name, email and phone if you register.
• Browsing data: IP address, device type, language and pages visited.
• Contact data: messages you send us by email, phone or WhatsApp.
• Preferences: language and theme settings stored in your browser.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of processing
purpose.body:
We use your data to:
• Manage your user account and access to the website.
• Display the product showcase and respond to your enquiries.
• Handle appointment requests or information about our workshop services.
• Maintain site security and improve its operation.
• Comply with applicable legal obligations.

legalBasis.title: 4. Legal basis
legalBasis.body:
The legal basis for processing may be:
• Your consent (e.g. when creating an account or contacting us).
• Performance of pre-contractual measures or a contract.
• Legitimate interest in maintaining and protecting the website.
• Compliance with legal obligations.

retention.title: 5. Retention period
retention.body: We will keep your data while you maintain an active account or as long as necessary for the stated purpose. Contact data will be kept only as long as needed to handle your request. Once legal periods expire or data is no longer required, it will be securely deleted or anonymised.

recipients.title: 6. Recipients and processors
recipients.body: We do not sell your data. We may share it only with providers that supply essential services for the website, such as hosting, database (Supabase) or messaging, always under contract and with appropriate safeguards. We may also disclose data to authorities when legally required.

rights.title: 7. Your rights
rights.body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing and portability by writing to {{email}}. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if you believe processing does not comply with the law.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: This website may use technical cookies and browser local storage to remember your session, language or theme preferences. You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies, although some features may no longer be available.

changes.title: 9. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy to reflect legal changes or service improvements. The current version will always be published on this page. We recommend reviewing it periodically.

diagnostics.title: Supabase diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Check the connection between the site and your Supabase project.
diagnostics.useChrome: Important: open this page in Chrome (http://localhost:5174/diagnostico), not in the editor preview.
diagnostics.help1: After changing .env: Ctrl+C in terminal → npm run dev → open the URL/port shown in the terminal.
diagnostics.help2: In the browser, https://YOUR-ID.supabase.co should respond (even if it says "invalid route").

overall.ok: Connection OK. Supabase responds and configuration looks valid.
overall.error: Connection problems detected. Follow the red hints below.
